zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Brocas於1429年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾波奧派爾時，她的父親William Brocas51歲，母親Joanna Sandys25歲。她於1444年與Richard Moore, I, Esq.結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年2月1日在英國哈普爾普雷斯頓 坎多福享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Brocas于1429年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾波奧派爾时，她的父亲William Brocas51岁，母亲Joanna Sandys25岁。她于1444年与Richard Moore, I, Esq.结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年2月1日在英国哈普爾普雷斯頓 坎多福享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brocas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  French: locative name from Brocas in Les Landes, SW France.

variants.name: Brookhouse
meanings: English: topographic name for a house by a stream, from Middle English brok(e) ‘brook’ + hous ‘house’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Brookhouse in Laughton (Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Brocas was born in 1429, in Beaurepaire, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Brocas, was 51 and her mother, Joanna Sandys, was 25. She married Richard Moore, I, Esq. in 1444. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 1 February 1475, in Preston Candover, Hampshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Brocas est née en 1429, à Beaurepaire, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Brocas, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joanna Sandys, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Moore, I, Esq. en 1444. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 février 1475, à Preston Candover, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Brocas 1429 in Beaurepaire, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Brocas 51 und ihre Mutter Joanna Sandys 25. Sie hat 1444 Richard Moore, I, Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Februar 1475 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Preston Candover, Hampshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brocas è nata il nel 1429 nel Beaurepaire, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Brocas, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Joanna Sandys, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Richard Moore, I, Esq. nel 1444. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 febbraio 1475, nel Preston Candover, Hampshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Brocasが1429年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアビーウレペアイアで生まれた時，父William Brocasは51歳，母Joanna Sandysは25歳であった。1444年にRichard Moore, I, Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年2月1日にイギリスハンプシュアイアプレストン カンドバーで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Brocas(이)가 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 보레파어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Brocas(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Sandys(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1444년 Richard Moore, I, Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 2월 1일 영국 함프실르 프레스턴 캔도버에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brocas nasceu em 1429, em Beaurepaire, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Brocas, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Sandys, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Moore, I, Esq. em 1444. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1475, em Preston Candover, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Brocas родилась в 1429 г. в местности борепеир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Brocas было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joanna Sandys, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Moore, I, Esq. в 1444 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 1 февраля 1475 г. в местности престон кандовир, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Brocas nació en 1429, en Beaurepaire, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Brocas, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Joanna Sandys, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Richard Moore, I, Esq. en 1444. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1475, en Preston Candover, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
